import { useState } from "react"; import LoggedIn from "../PopUps/LoggedInPopup"; export default function Login() { const [isLoggedIn, setIsLoggedIn] = useState(false); const handleLogin = async (e: React.FormEvent) => { e.preventDefault(); const form = e.target as HTMLFormElement; const email = (form.querySelector("#email") as HTMLInputElement).value; const password = (form.querySelector("#password") as HTMLInputElement) .value; const response = await fetch( `${process.env.REACT_APP_API_BASE_URL}/users/login`, { method: "POST", headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" }, body: JSON.stringify({ email, password }), } ); const data = await response.json(); if (data.token) { localStorage.setItem("authToken", data.token); setIsLoggedIn(true); } else { alert(data.message); } }; return ( <>
